Package org.rodinp.core

Interface IInternalElement

All Superinterfaces:
org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable, IElementManipulation, IParent, IRodinElement, ISnapshotable
All Known Subinterfaces:
IAction, IAssignmentElement, IAxiom, ICarrierSet, ICommentedElement, IConstant, IContextRoot, IContextRoot, IConvergenceElement, IData, IDependency, IDerivedPredicateElement, IEvent, IEventBRoot, IExpressionElement, IExtendsContext, IGuard, IIdentifierElement, IInvariant, ILabeledElement, ILanguage, IMachineRoot, IMachineRoot, IParameter, IPOHint, IPOIdentifier, IPOPredicate, IPOPredicateSet, IPORoot, IPORoot, IPOSelectionHint, IPOSequent, IPOSource, IPredicateElement, IPRExprRef, IPRHypAction, IPRIdentifier, IPRPredRef, IPRProof, IPRProofRule, IPRReasoner, IPRRoot, IPRRuleAntecedent, IPRStoredExpr, IPRStoredPred, IPRStringInput, IPSRoot, IPSStatus, IReference, IRefinesEvent, IRefinesMachine, ISCAction, ISCAssignmentElement, ISCAxiom, ISCCarrierSet, ISCConstant, ISCContextRoot, ISCContextRoot, ISCEvent, ISCExpressionElement, ISCExtendsContext, ISCGuard, ISCIdentifierElement, ISCInternalContext, ISCInvariant, ISCMachineRoot, ISCMachineRoot, ISCParameter, ISCPredicateElement, ISCProvableRoot, ISCRefinesEvent, ISCRefinesMachine, ISCSeesContext, ISCVariable, ISCVariant, ISCWitness, ISeesContext, ITestChildElement, ITestParentElement, ITraceableElement, IVariable, IVariant, IVersionEA, IVersionEB, IVersionEC, IVersionRootA, IVersionRootB, IVersionRootC, IVersionRootD, IVersionRootE, IVersionRootF, IVersionRootG, IVersionRootH, IWitness
All Known Implementing Classes:
Action, Axiom, CarrierSet, ComponentRoot, Constant, ContextRoot, ContextRoot, Data, Dependency, Event, EventBElement, EventBPOElement, EventBProofElement, EventBRoot, ExtendsContext, Guard, ImplicitHolder, InternalElement, Invariant, Language, MachineRoot, MachineRoot, NamedElement, NamedElement2, Parameter, POIdentifier, POPredicate, POPredicateSet, PORoot, PORoot, POSelectionHint, POSequent, POSource, PRExprRef, PRHypAction, PRIdentifier, PRPredRef, PRProof, PRProofRule, PRReasoner, PRRoot, PRRuleAntecedent, PRStoredExpr, PRStoredPred, PRStringInput, PSRoot, PSStatus, Reference, RefinesEvent, RefinesMachine, RodinTestDependency, RodinTestRoot, RodinTestRoot, RodinTestRoot2, SCAction, SCAssignmentElement, SCAxiom, SCCarrierSet, SCConstant, SCContextRoot, SCContextRoot, SCEvent, SCExpressionElement, SCExtendsContext, SCGuard, SCIdentifierElement, SCInternalContext, SCInvariant, SCMachineRoot, SCMachineRoot, SCParameter, SCPredicateElement, SCRefinesEvent, SCRefinesMachine, SCSeesContext, SCVariable, SCVariant, SCWitness, SeesContext, TestChildElement, TestParentElement, UbiquitousElement, Variable, Variant, VersionEA, VersionEB, VersionEC, VersionRootA, VersionRootB, VersionRootC, VersionRootD, VersionRootE, VersionRootF, VersionRootG, VersionRootH, Witness
public interface IInternalElement extends IElementManipulation, ISnapshotable, IParent
Common protocol for all internal elements.

Internal elements are elements of the database that are stored within Rodin files (i.e., are descendants thereof).

For each Rodin file, the database provides two versions:

  • a stable snapshot that corresponds to the contents of the Rodin file on disk, and which is read-only.
  • a buffered copy of the Rodin file in memory which is read-write.
As a consequence, there are two kinds of handles for internal elements depending on the kind of the file they belong to.

Since:
1.0

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    create(IInternalElement nextSibling, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor)
    Creates this internal element in the database.

    T
    createChild(IInternalElementType<T> type, IInternalElement nextSibling, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor)
    Creates a new child of this element in the database and returns a handle to it.
    void
    createProblemMarker(IAttributeType.String attributeType, int charStart, int charEnd, IRodinProblem problem, Object... args)
    Creates a new Rodin Problem marker for the given String attribute of this element, and located at the given position in the attribute.

    Creates a new Rodin Problem marker for the given attribute of this element.

    IInternalElement

    Returns a handle to this element in the mutable copy of its Rodin file.
    IInternalElement

    Returns the first openable parent.

    Returns the innermost resource enclosing this element.

    Returns the Rodin file containing this internal element.
    IInternalElement

    Returns the root ancestor of this element.
    IInternalElement

    Returns a handle to the element which has the same relative path as this element, but relative to the given file.
    IInternalElement
    getSnapshot()
    Returns a handle to this element in the snapshot of its Rodin file.
    org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile
    getUnderlyingResource()
    Returns the smallest underlying resource that contains this element, or null if this element is not contained in a resource.
    boolean
    hasAttribute(IAttributeType type)
    Tells whether this element carries an attribute with the given type.
    boolean

    Returns whether this element and the given element have the same attributes in the Rodin database.

    boolean
    hasSameContents(IInternalElement other)
    Returns whether this element and the given element have the same contents in the Rodin database.

    Removes the attribute with the given type from this element.

    Sets the given attribute value to this element.

  • Method Details

    • create

      void create(IInternalElement nextSibling, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Creates this internal element in the database. As a side effect, all ancestors of this element are open if they were not already.
      Parameters:
      nextSibling - sibling before which this element should be created (must have the same parent as this element), or null to create this element in the last position
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if the element could not be created. Reasons include:
      • The parent of this element or the given sibling does not exist (ELEMENT_DOES_NOT_EXIST)
      • The parent of this element is read-only (READ_ONLY)
      • There already exists a child element with the given type and name (NAME_COLLISION)
      • The given sibling is invalid (INVALID_SIBLING)
      • A CoreException occurred while accessing an underlying resource
      See Also:
      • createChild(IInternalElementType, IInternalElement, IProgressMonitor)

    • createChild

      <T extends IInternalElement> T createChild(IInternalElementType<T> type, IInternalElement nextSibling, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Creates a new child of this element in the database and returns a handle to it. As a side effect, this element and all its ancestors are open if they were not already. The name of the created child is automatically assigned by the database to prevent any name collision.
      Parameters:
      type - type of the child to create
      nextSibling - sibling before which the child should be created (must have this element as parent), or null to create the child in the last position
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if the child could not be created. Reasons include:
      • This element or the given sibling does not exist (ELEMENT_DOES_NOT_EXIST)
      • This element is read-only (READ_ONLY)
      • The given sibling is invalid (INVALID_SIBLING)
      • The given type is not allowed for a child of this element (INVALID_CHILD_TYPE)
      • A CoreException occurred while accessing an underlying resource
      See Also:
      • create(IInternalElement, IProgressMonitor)

    • createProblemMarker

      void createProblemMarker(IAttributeType attributeType, IRodinProblem problem, Object... args) throws RodinDBException
      Creates a new Rodin Problem marker for the given attribute of this element.

      The new marker is attached to the underlying resource of this element. Its marker type is RodinMarkerUtil.RODIN_PROBLEM_MARKER.

      Parameters:
      attributeType - type of the attribute to mark, or null if no attribute should be marked
      problem - problem to attach to the new marker
      args - arguments to the problem
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this method fails. Reasons include:
      • This element does not exist.
      See Also:
      • RodinMarkerUtil

    • createProblemMarker

      void createProblemMarker(IAttributeType.String attributeType, int charStart, int charEnd, IRodinProblem problem, Object... args) throws RodinDBException
      Creates a new Rodin Problem marker for the given String attribute of this element, and located at the given position in the attribute.

      The new marker is attached to the underlying resource of this element. Its marker type is RodinMarkerUtil.RODIN_PROBLEM_MARKER.

      Parameters:
      attributeType - type of the attribute to mark, or null if no attribute should be marked
      charStart - start position (zero-relative and inclusive), or a negative value to indicate its absence
      charEnd - end position (zero-relative and exclusive), or a negative value to indicate its absence
      problem - problem to attach to the new marker
      args - arguments to the problem
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this method fails. Reasons include:
      • This element does not exist.
      • The specified attribute is not set for this element, although start and end positions have been specified.
      • The start and end positions are specified together with a null attribute id.
      • The start and end positions are specified with an attribute id whose kind is not string.
      • The start or end position is negative, but not both.
      • The end position is less than or equal to the start position.
      See Also:
      • RodinMarkerUtil

    • getElementType

      IInternalElementType<? extends IInternalElement> getElementType()
      Description copied from interface: IRodinElement
      Returns the type of this element.

      This is a handle-only method.

      Specified by:
      getElementType in interface IRodinElement
      Returns:
      the element type

    • getRodinFile

      IRodinFile getRodinFile()
      Returns the Rodin file containing this internal element.

      This is a handle-only method.

      Returns:
      the Rodin file containing this element

    • getNextSibling

      IInternalElement getNextSibling() throws RodinDBException
      Returns the internal element that follows this element in the children list of its parent or null if this element is the last sibling.

      This method is useful when one needs to create an element just after another. It allows to get the parameter to be passed to the create() for properly ordering the created element.

      Returns:
      the next sibling of this internal element or null if this element is the last child of its parent
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element does not exist or if an exception occurs while accessing its corresponding resource

    • getAttributeTypes

      IAttributeType[] getAttributeTypes() throws RodinDBException
      Returns an array of the types of all attributes currently attached to this element. If this element doesn't carry any attribute, an empty array is returned.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Returns:
      the types of all attributes of this element
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element does not exist or if an exception occurs while accessing its corresponding resource

    • getAttributeValues

      IAttributeValue[] getAttributeValues() throws RodinDBException
      Returns an array of the values of all attributes currently attached to this element. If this element doesn't carry any attribute, an empty array is returned.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Returns:
      the values of all attributes of this element
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element does not exist or if an exception occurs while accessing its corresponding resource

    • getAttributeValue

      IAttributeValue getAttributeValue(IAttributeType type) throws RodinDBException
      Returns the value of the attribute with the given type and carried by this element.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute
      Returns:
      the value of the attribute with the given type
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element or the specified attribute does not exist or if an exception occurs while accessing its corresponding resource

    • getAttributeValue

      boolean getAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Boolean type) throws RodinDBException
      Returns the value of the attribute with the given boolean type and carried by this element.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute
      Returns:
      the value of the attribute with the given type
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element or the specified attribute does not exist or if an exception occurs while accessing its corresponding resource

    • getAttributeValue

      IRodinElement getAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Handle type) throws RodinDBException
      Returns the value of the attribute with the given handle type and carried by this element.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute
      Returns:
      the value of the attribute with the given type
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element or the specified attribute does not exist or if an exception occurs while accessing its corresponding resource

    • getAttributeValue

      int getAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Integer type) throws RodinDBException
      Returns the value of the attribute with the given integer type and carried by this element.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute
      Returns:
      the value of the attribute with the given type
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element or the specified attribute does not exist or if an exception occurs while accessing its corresponding resource

    • getAttributeValue

      long getAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Long type) throws RodinDBException
      Returns the value of the attribute with the given long integer type and carried by this element.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute
      Returns:
      the value of the attribute with the given type
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element or the specified attribute does not exist or if an exception occurs while accessing its corresponding resource or if the given attribute has another kind than long

    • getAttributeValue

      String getAttributeValue(IAttributeType.String type) throws RodinDBException
      Returns the value of the attribute with the given string type and carried by this element.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute
      Returns:
      the value of the attribute with the given type
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element or the specified attribute does not exist or if an exception occurs while accessing its corresponding resource

    • getInternalElement

      <T extends IInternalElement> T getInternalElement(IInternalElementType<T> childType, String childName)
      Returns a handle to a child internal element with the given type and name.

      Since Rodin 3.0, the database enforces restrictions on the type of child elements. The given type must be allowed as a child type for the type of this element through extension point org.rodinp.core.itemRelations.

      This is a handle-only method. The child element may or may not be present.

      Parameters:
      childType - type of the child element
      childName - name of the child element
      Returns:
      the child internal element with the given type and name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the given type of the child element is not allowed for this element
      Since:
      3.0
      See Also:
      • createChild(IInternalElementType, IInternalElement, IProgressMonitor)
      • IInternalElementType.canParent(IInternalElementType)

    • getRoot

      IInternalElement getRoot()
      Returns the root ancestor of this element. If this element is a root element, it is returned. Otherwise, the nearest ancestor which is a root element is returned.

      For an element belonging to a Rodin file, this is fully equivalent to 

      getRodinFile().getRoot()

      Returns:
      the root ancestor of this element
      See Also:
      • IRodinElement.isRoot()

    • getSimilarElement

      IInternalElement getSimilarElement(IRodinFile newFile)
      Returns a handle to the element which has the same relative path as this element, but relative to the given file. In particular, if this element is a file, then the given file is returned.

      Since Rodin 3.0, the database enforces restrictions on the type of child elements as declared through extension point org.rodinp.core.itemRelations. If this element is not a root element and if the root element type of the given file does not allow as child the type of the below root ancestor of this element, then an IllegalArgumentException is raised, as the handle to the similar element cannot be built.

      This is a handle-only method.

      Parameters:
      newFile - file in which to construct the new handle
      Returns:
      an element with the same path relative to the given file as this element
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the returned handle would violate the database restrictions on parent-child relationships

    • hasAttribute

      boolean hasAttribute(IAttributeType type) throws RodinDBException
      Tells whether this element carries an attribute with the given type.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute
      Returns:
      true iff this element carries an attribute with the given type
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element does not exist or if an exception occurs while accessing its corresponding resource

    • hasSameAttributes

      boolean hasSameAttributes(IInternalElement other) throws RodinDBException
      Returns whether this element and the given element have the same attributes in the Rodin database. Two elements have the same attributes if and only if:
      • they both don't exist or they both exist and
      • they carry the same attributes (if any) with the same values.

      Parameters:
      other - the element to test for similar attributes
      Returns:
      true iff this element and the given element have the same attributes in the Rodin database
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if an error was encountered while comparing the elements

    • hasSameChildren

      boolean hasSameChildren(IInternalElement other) throws RodinDBException
      Returns whether this element and the given element have the same children in the Rodin database. Two elements have the same children if and only if:
      • they both don't exist or they both exist and
      • their children (if any, and taken in order) have the same contents

      Parameters:
      other - the element to test for similar children
      Returns:
      true iff this element and the given element contain the same children in the Rodin database
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if an error was encountered while comparing the elements or their descendants.

    • hasSameContents

      boolean hasSameContents(IInternalElement other) throws RodinDBException
      Returns whether this element and the given element have the same contents in the Rodin database. Two elements have the same contents if and only if:
      • they have the same element name and element type.
      • they both don't exist or they both exist and:
        • they carry the same attributes (if any) with the same values;
        • their children (if any, and taken in order) have the same contents.

      Parameters:
      other - the element to test for similar contents
      Returns:
      true iff this element and the given element contain the same subtree in the Rodin database
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if an error was encountered while comparing the elements or their descendants.

    • removeAttribute

      void removeAttribute(IAttributeType type, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Removes the attribute with the given type from this element. If the attribute didn't exist previously, this method returns directly, no exception is thrown.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute to remove
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element does not exist or if an exception occurs while accessing its corresponding resource

    • setAttributeValue

      void setAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Boolean type, boolean newValue, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Sets the value of the attribute with the given boolean type to the given value. If the specified attribute didn't exist, it is created.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute
      newValue - value to set
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element does not exist or if an exception occurs while accessing its corresponding resource or if this element cannot carry an attribute of the given type
      Since:
      3.0
      See Also:
      • IInternalElementType.canCarry(IAttributeType)

    • setAttributeValue

      void setAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Handle type, IRodinElement newValue, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Sets the value of the attribute with the given handle type to the given value. If the specified attribute didn't exist, it is created.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute
      newValue - value to set
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element does not exist or if an exception occurs while accessing its corresponding resource or if this element cannot carry an attribute of the given type
      Since:
      3.0
      See Also:
      • IInternalElementType.canCarry(IAttributeType)

    • setAttributeValue

      void setAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Integer type, int newValue, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Sets the value of the attribute with the given integer type to the given value. If the specified attribute didn't exist, it is created.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute
      newValue - value to set
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element does not exist or if an exception occurs while accessing its corresponding resource or if this element cannot carry an attribute of the given type
      Since:
      3.0
      See Also:
      • IInternalElementType.canCarry(IAttributeType)

    • setAttributeValue

      void setAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Long type, long newValue, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Sets the value of the attribute with the given long integer type to the given value. If the specified attribute didn't exist, it is created.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute
      newValue - value to set
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element does not exist or if an exception occurs while accessing its corresponding resource or if this element cannot carry an attribute of the given type
      Since:
      3.0
      See Also:
      • IInternalElementType.canCarry(IAttributeType)

    • setAttributeValue

      void setAttributeValue(IAttributeType.String type, String newValue, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Sets the value of the attribute with the given string type to the given value. If the specified attribute didn't exist, it is created.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute
      newValue - value to set
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element does not exist or if an exception occurs while accessing its corresponding resource or if this element cannot carry an attribute of the given type
      Since:
      3.0
      See Also:
      • IInternalElementType.canCarry(IAttributeType)

    • setAttributeValue

      void setAttributeValue(IAttributeValue newValue, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Sets the given attribute value to this element. If the specified attribute didn't exist, it is created.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      newValue - value to set
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element does not exist or if an exception occurs while accessing its corresponding resource or if this element cannot carry an attribute with the given value
      Since:
      3.0
      See Also:
      • IInternalElementType.canCarry(IAttributeType)

    • getSnapshot

      IInternalElement getSnapshot()
      Description copied from interface: ISnapshotable
      Returns a handle to this element in the snapshot of its Rodin file.

      This is a handle-only method. The element may or may not be present.

      Specified by:
      getSnapshot in interface ISnapshotable
      Returns:
      this element in the snapshot of its Rodin file

    • getMutableCopy

      IInternalElement getMutableCopy()
      Description copied from interface: ISnapshotable
      Returns a handle to this element in the mutable copy of its Rodin file.

      This is a handle-only method. The element may or may not be present.

      Specified by:
      getMutableCopy in interface ISnapshotable
      Returns:
      this element in the mutable copy of its Rodin file

    • getOpenable

      IRodinFile getOpenable()
      Description copied from interface: IRodinElement
      Returns the first openable parent. If this element is openable, the element itself is returned. Returns null if this element doesn't have an openable parent.

      This is a handle-only method.

      Specified by:
      getOpenable in interface IRodinElement
      Returns:
      the first openable parent or null if this element doesn't have an openable parent.

    • getResource

      org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile getResource()
      Description copied from interface: IRodinElement
      Returns the innermost resource enclosing this element.

      This is a handle-only method.

      Specified by:
      getResource in interface IRodinElement
      Returns:
      the innermost resource enclosing this element

    • getUnderlyingResource

      org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile getUnderlyingResource()
      Description copied from interface: IRodinElement
      Returns the smallest underlying resource that contains this element, or null if this element is not contained in a resource.

      This is a handle-only method.

      Specified by:
      getUnderlyingResource in interface IRodinElement
      Returns:
      the underlying resource, or null if none
